# Renu Writes Poem – Website Improvement To-Do

## Overall Goal
Transform the website from a beautiful portfolio into a premium author platform that encourages visitors to read, engage, and return.

---

# 🔥 High Priority

## Homepage

- [ ] Add **Latest Poems** section (3–6 recent poems)
- [ ] Add **Featured Poem of the Day**
- [ ] Add **Featured Quote** section with elegant typography
- [ ] Add **Featured Book** section with CTA
- [ ] Add **Reader Testimonials**
- [ ] Add **Newsletter Subscription**
- [ ] Add **Instagram Feed Preview**
- [ ] Add **Languages** section (English, Hindi, Marathi)
- [ ] Add **Upcoming Books / Releases**
- [ ] Add **Writing Journey Timeline**

---
